rule: An implementation is conformant only when official-runtime results and documented expectations agree. Independent emulators are secondary evidence.

areas.golden_status: Authorized Education 0.2.7 matches all 10 emitted events from the production-Wasm candidate. This closes the sampled static fixed-point, trigonometric, endian, and shared-memory values only; scheduler and un-emitted memory state remain outside this golden.
The source-bound production-Wasm candidate matches the manual-derived six-host-tick fixture. Authorized official runtime capture is still required before this becomes an event golden.
The source-bound production-Wasm candidate matches the manual-derived six-host-tick fixture. Authorized official runtime capture is still required before this becomes an event golden.

areas.education_capture_command: pnpm import:official-education-probe -- --authorized-official-education-runtime --operator-artifact-declaration --runtime-version 0.2.7 --runtime-asset /private/staging/pico8_edu_0207.js --runtime-asset-url https://www.pico-8-edu.com/play/pico8_edu_0207.js --browser-name Chromium --browser-version <version> --load-method local-cart-file-selection --cart tests/conformance/probes/raster_state.p8 --source-dir /private/staging/raster-state --event-log events.txt --output captures/official/0.2.7-education/raster_state.json
areas.golden_status: Authorized Education 0.2.7 matches all 10 emitted events from the production-Wasm candidate for camera, clip, palette, sprite transparency, and map-layer state. The comparison is event-level; exact live RGBA is separately qualified by curved_raster_live.

Authorized Education 0.2.7 matches all 21 emitted events from the production-Wasm candidate for fill patterns, secondary colours, inversion, tline precision, and remapped video/map memory. Exact live RGBA remains owned by the curved-raster visual golden.

areas.education_capture_scope: 38-event golden plus an exact 128x128 live canvas backing-store PNG bound by the 2x2 origin marker; browser JPEG and colour-transformed page screenshots are ineligible
areas.visual_education_capture_command: pnpm import:official-education-probe -- --authorized-official-education-runtime --operator-artifact-declaration --runtime-version 0.2.7 --runtime-asset /private/staging/pico8_edu_0207.js --runtime-asset-url https://www.pico-8-edu.com/play/pico8_edu_0207.js --browser-name Chromium --browser-version <version> --load-method official-drag-drop-data-path --cart tests/conformance/probes/curved_raster_live.p8 --source-dir /private/staging/curved-raster-live --event-log events.txt --output captures/official/0.2.7-education/curved_raster_live.json --artifact curved_raster.png
areas.golden_status: Authorized Education 0.2.7 matches all 38 curved-raster events and the exact 128x128 live canvas backing-store RGBA. The live probe uses an empty __gfx__ terminator for the Education EOF parser boundary. Lossy browser screenshots and colour-transformed page captures are rejected; licensed desktop remains valid for capabilities Education does not expose.
covers: oval and ovalfill odd/even bounding boxes
rounded rectangle pixel dimensions and radius clamp

areas.education_capture_command: pnpm import:official-education-probe -- --authorized-official-education-runtime --operator-artifact-declaration --runtime-version 0.2.7 --runtime-asset /private/staging/pico8_edu_0207.js --runtime-asset-url https://www.pico-8-edu.com/play/pico8_edu_0207.js --browser-name Chromium --browser-version <version> --load-method local-cart-file-selection --cart tests/conformance/probes/p8scii.p8 --source-dir /private/staging/p8scii --event-log events.txt --output captures/official/0.2.7-education/p8scii.json
areas.golden_status: Authorized Education 0.2.7 matches all 14 static events from the production-Wasm candidate: metrics, inline/custom pixels, cursor and colour/background state, repeat/termination, raw writes, outline, and underline. The probe executes from _init() and uses an empty __gfx__ terminator to satisfy the Education cart lifecycle without changing text semantics. Delayed execution, exact built-in font bitmaps beyond the sampled metrics, runtime memory checkpoints beyond emitted values, and PCM/audio commands still require licensed desktop evidence.
deferred: frame-delayed printing and exact scheduler timing

areas.golden_status: Official PICO-8 capture required; independent runtimes are not normative.
Official PICO-8 WAV and stat(46..57) captures required; independent runtimes are not normative.

areas.education_capture_command: pnpm import:official-education-probe -- --authorized-official-education-runtime --operator-artifact-declaration --runtime-version 0.2.7 --runtime-asset /private/staging/pico8_edu_0207.js --runtime-asset-url https://www.pico-8-edu.com/play/pico8_edu_0207.js --browser-name Chromium --browser-version <version> --load-method local-cart-file-selection --cart tests/conformance/probes/language.p8 --source-dir /private/staging/language --event-log events.txt --output captures/official/0.2.7-education/language.json
areas.golden_status: Authorized Education 0.2.7 matches all 18 emitted events from the production-Wasm candidate. The oracle exposed and now guards the rule that a non-numeric third sub() argument behaves like an omitted end position. The source cart's legacy diagnostic comment is retained byte-for-byte for official-capture hash identity; the captured event and expected fixture supersede that assumption. This static golden does not qualify scheduler or host lifecycle semantics.

areas.education_capture_command: Run persistence_write.p8 in official Education 0.2.7 through local cart file selection, reload the same browser profile, then run persistence_read.p8; import both event logs with pnpm import:official-education-probe.
areas.comparison_command: pnpm compare:official-probe separately for the write and reloaded-read official/candidate records
areas.golden_status: Authorized Education 0.2.7 and production Wasm match all 6 write-phase and 4 reloaded-read events. The official page reload preserved the named slot, cartdata() returned false before creation and true after restoration, dget/dset retained signed 16:16 values at indices 0 and 63, and 0x5e00 mapped the first value. This qualifies one named-slot cross-reload path only.
deferred: multi-cart load parameters and four-slot switching
